---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new routing strategy, provider, UI feature, or pipeline capability
labels: enhancement
---

## Summary

What would you like Prismatix to do that it does not do today?

## Motivation

What problem does this solve, or what use case does it enable?

## Proposed approach

How do you imagine this being implemented? Which layer would it touch?

## Area(s) affected

- [ ] Routing / complexity scorer (`supabase/functions/router/`)
- [ ] AI provider integration (Anthropic, OpenAI, Gemini, NVIDIA, DeepInfra)
- [ ] Frontend / chat UI (`src/components/`)
- [ ] Cost tracking / budget guard (`src/costEngine.ts`)
- [ ] Debate mode or SMD pipeline
- [ ] Video pipeline
- [ ] Auth / Supabase edge functions
- [ ] Other / unsure

## Alternatives considered

Any other approaches you evaluated.

## Additional context

Links, examples, or related issues.
